paragraphs.text: Android has become a fundamental backbone of how the digital world works. Google's interests controlling more and more of how it works have always led to more central control. This isn't in the interest of anyone but Google. In a world where I, as an American, am a second class citizen on iOS VS anyone in Europe, I want to make it clear that, as unfair as it is, I think of you as a better protector of my rights than my own government . You have a carve out where Apple needs to follow the rules. Don't let Google take control of the only practical alternative to Apple's domination. Your decision to block them in Europe creates a pathway towards anyone else escaping Google's interests anywhere on earth. It's not only good for EU citizens, but will have the side effect of also being good for me.
